name: C-DAC Pune – Consultant – 07 Posts
qualification: Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, MCA

basic_details.job_title: C-DAC Pune Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: C-DAC Pune Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 07 vacancies for Consultant posts. Candidates can apply online only from 16.05.2026 to 30.05.2026 through C-DAC Pune website careers.cdac.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), Pune
basic_details.post_name: Consultant (Part Time / Full Time) – Data Center Operations, Domain Expert – Police, Module Lead

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 64 years for Consultant – Module Lead & Domain Expert – Police Not more than 50 years for Consultant – Data Center Operations (as on cut-off date)

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, MCA

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online through the official C-DAC Careers portal https://careers.cdac.in. No offline or email applications will be accepted.
